slots.caption_ig:
9th Street's Italian Market is thriving as a destination. It's slowly becoming something else as a neighborhood. We traced the blocks, talked to the families, and found out what happens when a market becomes mostly a place to visit.

#ForkFox #ItalianMarket #SouthPhilly #Philadelphia #FoodEconomy
slots.caption_fb: Philadelphia's Italian Market is one of the oldest food neighborhoods in America. We walked 9th Street and found something uncomfortable: the storefronts stay, the families are changing, and the economics are shifting fast. What happens when a working market becomes a destination?
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Editorial b-roll of the topic in 'Italian Market South Philadelphia: 9th Street's Nonna Recipes Meet Fusion Futures'. Calm pace, no music vocals. End frame: article title + 'Link in bio.'
